CustomField.formula: AND(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "With Patient"), NOT(ISBLANK(Expected_Study_Date__c)), OR(AND(Expected_Study_Date__c + 0.5 < NOW(), ISBLANK(Last_Study_Follow_up_Attempt__c)), AND(Expected_Study_Date__c + 0.5 < NOW(), Last_Study_Follow_up_Attempt__c < Expected_Study_Date__c ), AND(Last_Study_Follow_up_Attempt__c + 0.5 < NOW(), Last_Study_Follow_up_Attempt__c > Expected_Study_Date__c) ) )
CustomField.label: Study Follow-up Required
